/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/breakout_week2.dir/Ball.cpp.o CMakeFiles/breakout_week2.dir/Brick.cpp.o CMakeFiles/breakout_week2.dir/Game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/breakout_week2.dir/Paddle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/breakout_week2.dir/PowerUp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/breakout_week2.dir/main.cpp.o -o breakout_week2  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/libraylib.so.6.0.0 -lm
